rollback.sql: update public.request_type set resource_type = null where code = 'EMP_REISSUE';

changeSet.author: P35066
changeSet.sql: update public.request_type set resource_type = 'ACCOUNT' where code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE';

rollback.sql: update public.request_type set resource_type = null where code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE';

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'request_type' AND column_name = 'resource_type';

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO public.request_type (id, code, description, process_definition_id, history_category, hold_history, displayed_in_progress, cascadable, can_create_manually, resource_type) VALUES(nextval('request_type_seq'), 'AER', 'AER', 'PROCESS_AER', 'REPORTING', true, true, false, false, 'ACCOUNT');
